name: Tulip, Crab, and Asparagus Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Minced fresh dill or mint
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the cream cheese with lemon juice, herbs, and pepper (if using). Stir in the crab meat.
2. Remove tough ends from the asparagus. Blanch in boiling water until crisp-tender, about 2 to 5 minutes depending on thickness. Cool quickly in an ice-water bath for 1 minute, then pat dry.
3. Trim the asparagus to about 5 inches long and cut into rounds using the saved trimmings. Fill each tulip petal with approximately half a rounded teaspoon of crab mixture. Garnish with one or two asparagus rounds per petal.
4. Arrange the asparagus rounds in a fan on a serving platter, placing the tulip petals alternately.
